rules.rule_statement: Invoices must be submitted to Suncor’s Accounts Payable department or entered into the online system with compliant supporting documentation.
rules.action_or_limit: Invoices must meet the criteria of 'Compliant Invoice'.
rules.external_reference_source: Appendix B – Compensation and the Invoicing Requirements

rules.rule_statement: Final invoices must indicate that the Contractor has complied with all laws in relation to its performance under the contract as of the date of the invoice.
rules.action_or_limit: Contractor must confirm compliance with all laws.

rules.rule_statement: All payments shall be made based on the compensation outlined in Appendix B, subject to adjustments from the Letter of Understanding.
rules.action_or_limit: Payments will be based on Appendix B – Compensation.

rules.rule_statement: Payments are made on the basis of Appendix B - Compensation subject to adjustments.
rules.action_or_limit: Adjustments as per Appendix F - Letter of Understanding.

rules.rule_statement: Payment terms are net 60 days from the date on a compliant invoice.
rules.action_or_limit: Payment not exceeding 60 days post-invoice date.

rules.rule_statement: Compensation structure shall be governed by the applicable Lump Sum, Unit Rate or Cost Reimbursable section of Appendix B – Compensation.
rules.action_or_limit: To be determined by the governed structure in Appendix B.

rules.rule_statement: Performance-based compensation model must be established prior to the Work commencement.
rules.action_or_limit: Baseline compensation structure and key performance indicators set.
rules.external_reference_source: Work Authorization or an Amendment to the Multiple Use Contract

rules.rule_statement: Cost Reimbursable Compensation must reference agreed rates and positions.
rules.action_or_limit: As per cost reimbursement agreements.
rules.external_reference_source: Attachment CR 1 – Indirect Labour Reimbursable Positions and Rates, Attachment CR 2 – Non-Union Direct Labour Reimbursable Positions and Rates, Attachment CR 3 – Union Direct Labour Reimbursable Positions and Rates, Attachment CR 4 – Equipment

rules.rule_statement: Reimbursable Personnel will not be compensated for specific personal expenses such as communication, entertainment, food or beverage, or pet or companion costs.
rules.action_or_limit: No compensation for specified personal expenses

rules.rule_statement: Reimbursable Personnel will be compensated for travel costs such as air fare, bus fare, taxi fare, and mileage under specified circumstances.
rules.action_or_limit: Air fare, Bus fare, Taxi fare, Mileage at $0.52/km

rules.rule_statement: To be reimbursed for travel expenses, Reimbursable Personnel must provide specific documentation.
rules.action_or_limit: Itinerary and boarding passes for air travel, receipts for taxi travel

rules.rule_statement: If Reimbursable Personnel need to change or reschedule travel plans after booking, approval from a Suncor director is required for reimbursement of any additional out-of-pocket expenses.
rules.trigger_condition: Travel plans are changed or rescheduled
rules.action_or_limit: Approval required for additional expenses

rules.rule_statement: The Contractor shall not receive any additional mark-up, Fee or Overhead on Pre-Approved Expenses.
rules.action_or_limit: No mark-up allowed

rules.rule_statement: The agreed cost for any scaffolding material shall adhere to specified rates.
rules.action_or_limit: Cost as per Scaffolding Material Used Rate or Scaffolding Material New Rate
rules.external_reference_source: Exhibit CR 6 – Suncor Approved Inventory List

rules.rule_statement: No mark-up, Fee, or Overhead is allowed on light vehicles.
rules.action_or_limit: 0% mark-up

rules.rule_statement: No mark-up, Fee, or Overhead is allowed on Actual Cost of Third Party Equipment provided by a Subcontractor that is an Affiliate of the Contractor.
rules.trigger_condition: When using Third Party Equipment from an Affiliate
rules.action_or_limit: 0% mark-up

rules.rule_statement: Every Change Order must include a description of its scope and specific details applicable to the change.
Change Orders must detail relevant Change Notice numbers and brief descriptions where applicable.
Change Orders must specify the Change Proposal description, including time requirements to perform the change.
Change Orders must assess and state the schedule impact of the change.
Change Orders must include any necessary compensation adjustments related to the change.
Change Orders must specify any adjustments to milestone/schedule incentives due to the change.
Change Orders must outline any adjustments to fixed fees as a result of the change.
Change Orders must state the 'not to exceed' amount for the adjustments mentioned.
Specific compensation calculations, hourly rates, and position details may be defined in external attachments.
rules.external_reference_source: Appendix B – Compensation, Appendix CR 1, Appendix CR 2

rules.rule_statement: Any performance guarantees shall be as set out in the applicable Work Authorization.
rules.action_or_limit: As per Work Authorization

rules.rule_statement: The Guarantee remains effective as long as the Contractor has any Guaranteed Obligations to be performed.
rules.action_or_limit: Effective until all Guaranteed Obligations are fulfilled

rules.rule_statement: In the event of a dispute arising, the parties may submit to arbitration or commence litigation.
rules.action_or_limit: submit to arbitration or commence litigation

rules.rule_statement: If arbitration is agreed upon, the parties must attempt to appoint a mutually acceptable arbitrator within 10 days.
rules.action_or_limit: appoint arbitrator within 10 days

rules.rule_statement: Payments related to disputes will be payable from a date determined in the arbitration proceedings.
rules.action_or_limit: payments due from date determined in arbitration

rules.rule_statement: Parties must continue to fulfill their contractual obligations despite disputes.
rules.action_or_limit: continue fulfilling contractual obligations

rules.rule_statement: The Contractor must require Subcontractors to enter similar dispute resolution agreements.
rules.action_or_limit: subcontractors must have similar agreements

rules.rule_statement: The Contractor must provide insurance as defined in the contract.
rules.action_or_limit: All amounts of applicable insurance coverage required under the Contract

rules.rule_statement: The Contractor shall provide evidence of compliance with applicable workers’ compensation legislation and coverage.
rules.action_or_limit: Proof of compliance with workers' compensation

rules.rule_statement: All property insurance policies must contain a waiver of subrogation against Suncor and related parties.
rules.action_or_limit: Waiver of subrogation

rules.rule_statement: The Contractor is responsible for payment of all deductibles applicable to the required insurance.
rules.action_or_limit: Payment of deductibles

rules.rule_statement: Each insurance policy must state that it cannot be cancelled without at least 30 days written notice to Suncor’s Representative.
rules.action_or_limit: 30 days' written notice required for cancellation

rules.rule_statement: If an employee does not swipe IN or OUT due to an incident, a Foreman or manager must note the reason on the timesheet.
rules.trigger_condition: No Swipe IN or OUT due to incident
rules.action_or_limit: No payment or late payment.

rules.rule_statement: For late swipes or missing swipes, an exclusive sign IN/OUT sheet with signature and start/end times must be provided.
rules.trigger_condition: Swipe IN or OUT not recorded
rules.action_or_limit: No payment or late payment.

rules.rule_statement: Employee must turn in their card on their last day of work.
rules.action_or_limit: Bill hours as per union or contractual agreement; bill for maximum hours swiped unless approval to bill for the full shift.

rules.rule_statement: If there is no swipe OUT due to a site safety incident, the foreman's or manager's notes should justify the absence.
rules.trigger_condition: No Swipe OUT due to site safety incident
rules.action_or_limit: No payment or late payment.

rules.rule_statement: If an employee swipes at a different machine, hours must be billed as per vendor approved timesheet.
rules.trigger_condition: Employee swipes at different swipe machine
rules.action_or_limit: Bill hours as per vendor approved timesheet.

rules.rule_statement: Complete a sign-in sheet for training courses if no swipe machines are available.
rules.trigger_condition: No swipe machines available at training facility
rules.action_or_limit: Validate employee full attendance to the course; attach course sign-in sheet to line item in CCC.

rules.rule_statement: For any early swipe OUT on the last day of employment, a termination log must be provided along with supporting attendance documentation.
rules.trigger_condition: Early Swipe OUT on last day of employment
rules.action_or_limit: No payment or late payment; attach exclusive sign IN/OUT sheet.

rules.rule_statement: Late swipes require an exclusive sign IN/OUT sheet and timely completion.
rules.action_or_limit: Please attach to line item in CCC; backup to support attendance.
